Keep scrollin for the bonus panels!
I've just unlocked the bonus panels for this one. Merry Christmas, imgur! If you'd like to support the comic (and see all my bonus panels and other exclusive comics), consider signing up to my Patreon! https://patreon.com/LoadingArtist ❤

item.title: It's the unhinged XL Thursday CeleryDump for the good & bad people of Imgur
item.description:
Greetings online friends
so much work
cray cray
I’m a fan of shrooms
well, there he is
well, a few people here on Imgur share more than me actually
it works for me
great suggestion
believable
gotta indulge sometimes
i love this meme format
looks pretty damn good to me
gonna have to use that one
but why
crip walking is good for your health
king of the world
that’s it for me.. have a great night gang!!

item.title: ~6 years ago, I was sleeping in my car in negative degrees. Today I put up my first Christmas tree.
item.description: It just makes me so happy. It's surreal to think about where I was versus where I am now. Wishing Imgur a safe, warm, happy holiday season. ❤️ Thank you @quietwalker for tips on attaching it to the ceiling-- was super easy. No issues with the cats!

item.title: Wholesome dump that made you smile : )
item.description:
1
2
3
4
5
6
7
8
9. And finally I would like to share with this awesome community my passion project. Me and my brother have started working games in the past few years. From scratch basically and we learned how to do it on our own. Today I'm proud to say our third game is close to release. It's inspired by the "The Stanley Parable" (same kinda of style and humor) and it would mean the world to us if you wishlisted the game on Steam. Check out the page here: https://store.steampowered.com/app/2336120/Do_Not_Press_The_Button_To_Delete_The_Multiverse/ I wish you all success in your personal passion projects! It's a blast to work on one :)))
item.dc:creator: TheseusGames

item.title: Return of the Meme: 1055 (deploy the crack)
item.description:
I am awake. I will make the universe sorry for being awake. The world will be sorry. Let's get this bread.
I am trying hard to adopt this.
I do miss creating this dialect with lovers, but I Also have a dialect with my best friends
Scrub.
This image and the next are not memes but something that I found to be neat: these are pre-contact metal knives forged from a meteorite that landed in the lands of the Tlingit people of coastal Canada and Alaska. Each has its own name and genealogy of those who used them.
This photo from the Alaska State Library Historical Collections is part of the Vincent Soboleff Photograph Collection, ca. 1896-1920. The description of the photo reads “The man holding the dagger is Gusht’eiheen (Spray Behind the Dorsal Fin) of the Killerwhale House of the Dakl’aweidí Clan in Angoon. The dagger he is holding was made by a man named Kucheesh, from a meteorite that fell near Klukwan. When it’s brought out in public, the words to announce its arrival are This came to us from the sky.'"
Re-creation of the gear of the dude buried in Sutton Hoo.
Cú Chulainn
Laaaaaadies
ippin tax Today's message froxvfdm* Pippin: "beep. It's okay! I love you. Good boy Pippin. Okay. Okay. Beep. Hahahaa. I love you. What the fuck? What doing? Good boy." *also left by Pippin walking across the keyboard as I typed this

item.title: I beat cancer.
item.description:
I did it. I’m recovering from a total hysterectomy that I had about two weeks ago. I am stressed out and worried about bills and trying to push my limits to work even though I’m not supposed to, so I thought I’d share my gofundme again. Please only donate if you have it to spare, I don’t want to put anyone out. I’m trying to be kind to myself and remember that if there were ever an acceptable time to ask for help, it’s now.
I also made a PayPal one, since folks seem to prefer one or the other. I have also reopened my art shop, and will keep it open as long as I can manage it physically. https://www.paypal.com/pools/c/909Yievk5O https://gofund.me/e2819a5d Shop: huntersmooncollective.carrd.co
A short list of other notable problems they found within the organs they removed. This nonsense in particular explains a lot of the issues I had with exhaustion, intense abdominal pain, depression, and other symptoms. Hopefully that all clears up as I heal. Right now I just feel totally useless and isolated and it’s just been a rough year and I just don’t feel comfortable. I’m trying so hard to keep it optimistic. I’m trying not to be pissed that I had to listen to doctors tell me to “lose 20lbs and see if that helps.” Ironically, I have lost 20lbs since my surgery, which the OB says was probably retained fluid and will likely slow down from here out.
Cat tax. Moose up top, Porkchop to the left, Jinx to the right. They’ve stayed close. Overall, I am trying to cheer up. I beat cancer. Not that I should have ever had it in the first place, you know, but whatever. I’m trying not to hang on to that anger, but it’s just taking some time for me to work through. The long version: So you don’t have to sift through old posts for the whole story, I was basically gaslit by doctors (america) for over four years with complaints of abdominal pain, low energy, depression, horrible periods, intrusive thoughts, and a handful of other issues. It took having a total meltdown in the hallway of a Planned Parenthood after being told that they couldn’t do everything I needed them to in one visit because they wanted to bill my insurance more than once. They called two days later to tell me I had cancer. That was in August. It’s been a really bad time. I’ve dealt with s**cidal ideation for about twenty of my 33 years on this planet, and it had become completely unmanageable in the past couple years. I was so tired of feeling like shit all the time and just didn’t want to do it anymore. Today is a really bad day for me, and it’s hard writing about this because it was the blatant negligence from medical professionals that almost killed me, just in a roundabout way. I would have absolutely finished the job if they hadn’t found this. I do feel better. I have more energy, mostly, and although healing is slow and hurts a lot and I’m so stressed about money, I am at least thinking about the future instead of the end. Here’s to the future.
item.dc:creator: wildsageHMC
